name_en: M48865 Black and White Pearl Chain / Extra Mini M10166 Capucines Handbag. Imported from France calfskin, shiny metal hardware. The unique Capucines flap can be tucked inside to display the lettering or flipped out to reveal the Monogram Flower pattern. Size: 16x11x6.5cm
